experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Built a full-stack regulatory data pipeline for life science websites, designed a PostgreSQL processing architecture with schema validation and resilient ingestion, and improved structured extraction quality for downstream compliance workflows.

experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
experience.description: Developed real-time multimodal prototypes for soft robotic systems using OCR, YOLOv11, OpenCV, MediaPipe, and LLM-based reasoning, and optimized the vision-LLM pipeline for low-latency deployment on Jetson devices.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Developed backend modules for an AI-powered mock interview platform, integrated LiveKit for real-time audio streaming, and helped deploy LLM-powered conversational interview agents.

what_drew_you_to_this_role: I like building production systems that combine solid backend engineering with practical AI workflows, and this role fits the work I have already done in data pipelines, real-time systems, and applied ML.
why_this_company: I am looking for a team where I can keep improving as an engineer while shipping real products, and the company’s product and technical scope align with that goal.
what_are_your_strengths: I am strong at turning ambiguous product ideas into working systems, moving across backend and applied AI work, and iterating quickly without losing rigor.
cover_letter_text:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for this role. I am a Mathematics and Computer Science student at New York University with hands-on experience across backend engineering, full-stack systems, and applied AI.

Most recently, I built regulatory data pipelines at Global Key Solutions, developed multimodal robotics prototypes at NYU AI Mechatronics Systems Lab, and contributed backend and real-time audio features at Wekruit. Across these roles, I have worked with Python, TypeScript, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Docker, and LLM-enabled workflows.

I would be excited to bring that mix of product-minded engineering and practical execution to your team.

Best regards,
Ruiyang Chen
